heading: Art. 144. Procedure
label: 944 Art. 144. Procedure
text: The United States Court of Appeals for the Armed Forces may prescribe its rules of procedure and may determine the number of judges required to constitute a quorum.
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “Court of Appeals for the Armed Forces” for “Court of Military Appeals”.Pub. L. 103–337
amendments: Amendments1994— substituted “Court of Appeals for the Armed Forces” for “Court of Military Appeals”.Pub. L. 103–337
